## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix (non-breaking change that fixes an issue)
- [ ] New function (non-breaking change that adds functionality)
- [ ] Breaking change (fix or feature that changes existing behavior)
- [ ] Documentation only
- [ ] Performance improvement

## Checklist

- [ ] `npm run check` passes (typecheck + lint + format + test)
- [ ] New functions have JSDoc with `@param`, `@returns`, `@example`
- [ ] New functions are exported from `src/index.ts`
- [ ] Tests added for new/changed code
- [ ] Bundle size verified (`npm run build` — should stay under 5 KB minzipped)

## Bundle size impact
